scope: /v1/models visible model list is filtered by the authenticated virtual key profile

auth_resolution: Bearer virtual key is authenticated before listing models.
When x-ai-profile is omitted, the virtual key default profile is used.
When x-ai-profile is present, it must resolve to an active profile bound to the same virtual key.
An unbound profile is rejected with error.code=api_key_profile_forbidden.
model_sql_predicates: auth.api_key_profile_id requires a matching active api_key_profiles row for the auth project
empty allowed_models means no profile allowlist restriction
denied_models containing canonical_models.model_key excludes the model
allowed_channel_tags must match at least one enabled OpenAI-compatible route channel when configured
blocked_provider_ids excludes models whose only candidate routes use blocked providers
a model is listed only when at least one enabled model_association, non-deleted OpenAI-compatible channel, enabled provider, and currently usable provider_key exists
model_aliases keys are request aliases only and are not returned as data[].id
canonical model keys shadowed by model_aliases to a different canonical key are excluded from data[].id

acceptance_cases.name: default_profile_models
acceptance_cases.expected: HTTP 200; response.gateway.profile_filtering=api_key_profile; data[].id contains the default profile model set

acceptance_cases.name: switched_profile_models
acceptance_cases.request: GET /v1/models with x-ai-profile bound to the same virtual key
acceptance_cases.expected: HTTP 200; response.gateway.profile_id differs from default profile_id; data[].id differs from the default profile model set

acceptance_cases.name: denied_model_hidden
acceptance_cases.request: GET /v1/models for a profile whose denied_models contains a canonical model key
acceptance_cases.expected: HTTP 200; denied model key is absent from data[].id

acceptance_cases.name: unroutable_or_provider_blocked_model_hidden
acceptance_cases.request: GET /v1/models for a profile whose otherwise allowed model has no profile-allowed enabled OpenAI-compatible route with a usable provider key
acceptance_cases.expected: HTTP 200; the model key is absent from data[].id

acceptance_cases.name: unbound_profile_rejected
acceptance_cases.request: GET /v1/models with x-ai-profile not bound to the virtual key

notes: This fixture records source-backed contract evidence. The dry-run verifier validates fixture intent only; live profile switching still requires a seeded virtual key with at least two active profile bindings.
